message:
feat(url-bar): add text selection, clipboard, and word navigation

- Add selection support: Shift+arrows, Shift+Home/End, Ctrl+A
- Add clipboard: Ctrl+X (cut), Ctrl+C (copy), Ctrl+V (paste)
- Add word navigation: Ctrl+Left/Right
- Add Delete key for forward delete
- Fix input.zig to parse xterm/Kitty modified cursor keys (ESC[1;modA/B/C/D)
- Fix parsing of modified nav keys (ESC[N;mod~)
- Uses pbcopy/pbpaste on macOS, xclip on Linux for clipboard
